name: Do you know someone…
description: Empathy-led cold-acquisition opener. Speaker addresses viewer about a third party they know.
structure: empathy hook → social proof (often stadium/numbers stat) → why it works (mechanism) → trust signal → seasonal urgency → soft CTA

examples_by_campaign.tallow-balm: Do you know someone with eczema, psoriasis or dry skin?
examples_by_campaign.shampoo-bar: Do you know someone whose scalp itches no matter what they try?
examples_by_campaign.reviana: Do you know someone whose skin overreacts to every anti-aging product they try?

name: Review prompt
description: Customer-quote-led video. Real or staged message read aloud, screenshot-overlaid, or paraphrased over product b-roll.
structure: customer quote (specific, time-bounded, 'we tried other things first') → frame line ('This message landed in our inbox after someone switched to…') → price/CTA

examples_by_campaign.tallow-balm: I'm Jeff, I'm in my mid-50s, and I suffer from eczema on my hands…
examples_by_campaign.shampoo-bar: My husband had scalp problems for years…
examples_by_campaign.reviana: I'm Sarah, in my 40s. Dark circles never went away — until Reviana.

name: Thousands of kiwis…
description: Stat-led / social-proof opener. Leads with a quantified social proof number rather than empathy.
structure: stat hook → product reveal → why popular (mechanism) → trust → seasonal urgency → CTA

examples_by_campaign.tallow-balm: More kiwis are using Primalcare tallow than can fit in Christchurch's rugby stadium…
examples_by_campaign.shampoo-bar: Thousands of kiwis are using our tallow shampoo bars every day…
examples_by_campaign.reviana: Thousands of kiwis with sensitive skin are now using Reviana to do the anti-aging their skin used to fight off.

name: This one [product]…
description: Single-product hero videos. Demonstrate one SKU, build the case for the format/size/scent, close with CTA.
structure: product reveal → format/scent/size justification → ingredient or feature stack → trust → CTA

examples_by_campaign.tallow-balm: Meet our new 250ml jars of Primalcare Tallow…
examples_by_campaign.shampoo-bar: These are two products I've been most excited to share with you…
examples_by_campaign.reviana: This one cream replaces your serum, moisturiser, and brightener — Reviana Day Cream.

name: Don't let sensitive skin hold back…
description: Reviana-specific empathy opener that frames the prospect's hesitation as a problem the product solves.
structure: empathy/permission hook → 'Meet Reviana [Product]' → feature bullets → texture sensory line → social proof anchor → CTA

examples_by_campaign.tallow-balm: Don't let dry, itchy skin hold back your day. (port — gap)
examples_by_campaign.shampoo-bar: Don't let a flaky scalp hold back your hair routine. (port — gap)
examples_by_campaign.reviana: Don't let sensitive skin hold back your anti-wrinkle routine.
